hero.heading_end: We get it open, compliant, and running.
hero.subheading: Utilities, licences, hygiene plans, insurance — all coordinated for you, from day one.

who_we_are.subtitle: Who We Are
who_we_are.title: Your Operational Backbone in Spain
who_we_are.description: We’re not a gestoría. We’re not a law firm. We started as energy advisors, working alongside lawyers on business purchases. While they handled the legal side, we handled everything after — utilities, hygiene plans, insurance, compliance. That gap became our business.

why_choose_us.subtitle: Why Choose Us
why_choose_us.title: One Contact. Every Solution.
why_choose_us.description: We’re not a gestoría. We’re not a law firm. We’re the operational backbone that makes your life or business in Spain actually work.

reasons.local_desc: Deep knowledge of how Spanish councils, utilities and compliance actually work.
reasons.time_desc: We handle the bureaucracy so you can focus on running your business.
reasons.trusted_desc: Vetted lawyers, gestorías, insurers and tradespeople, all coordinated by us.
reasons.contact_desc: You deal with one person. We deal with everyone else.

services.subtitle: Our Expertise
services.title: Services Tailored to You
services.description: Whether you are moving your family or expanding your business, we provide the specialized support you need.
